Container.Name: SpoolmanSync
Container.Overview: Automatic filament tracking for Bambu Lab and Creality printers with Spoolman. Provides a web dashboard for assigning spools to AMS/CFS trays, QR/barcode scanning for quick spool lookup, and automatic filament usage tracking after prints. Supports Bambu Lab printers (X1C, P1S, A1, H2D) via ha-bambulab, and Creality printers (K1, K2, Hi, Ender 3 V3) via ha_creality_ws. Requires Home Assistant with the appropriate integration and a Spoolman instance.
Container.Requires: Requires Home Assistant with ha-bambulab (for Bambu Lab) or ha_creality_ws (for Creality) integration installed, and a Spoolman instance.

Config.Name: HA Mode
Config.Description: Home Assistant mode. Use 'external' to connect to your existing HA instance.
